Whisper.en: Hi, I would like to buy your {{ITEM}} in {{LEAGUE}}
Whisper.zh: 你好，我希望购买你的 {{ITEM}} 在 {{LEAGUE}}区

Whisper.en: Hi, I would like to buy your {{ITEM}} listed for {{PRICE}} in {{LEAGUE}}
Whisper.zh: 你好，我希望购买你的{{ITEM}} ，标价 {{PRICE}} ，在 {{LEAGUE}}区

Whisper.en: Hi, I would like to buy your {{ITEM}} in {{LEAGUE}} (stash tab "{{STASH}}"; position: left {{LEFT}}, top {{TOP}})
Whisper.zh: 您好，我想在{{LEAGUE}}中购买您的{{ITEM}}，（仓库标签："{{STASH}}"; 位置：左 {{LEFT}}，上 {{TOP}}）

Whisper.en: Hi, I would like to buy your {{ITEM}} listed for {{PRICE}} in {{LEAGUE}} (stash tab "{{STASH}}"; position: left {{LEFT}}, top {{TOP}})
Whisper.zh: 你好，我希望购买你的{{ITEM}} ，标价 {{PRICE}} ，在 {{LEAGUE}}区 (市集页 "{{STASH}}"; 位置: 左起 {{LEFT}}, 上起 {{TOP}})
